nasb.text: These things I have written to you who believe in the name of the Son of God, so that you may know that you have eternal life.

esv.text: I write these things to you who believe in the name of the Son of God, that you may know that you have eternal life.

cnv.text: 我把這些事寫給你們信　神的兒子之名的人，是要你們知道自己有永生。

ccb.text: 我把这些事写给你们这些信上帝儿子之名的人，是要你们知道自己有永生。

csbs.text: 我把这些事写给你们信神儿子之名的人，好让你们知道：你们有永恒的生命。
